chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1489 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5827/2025 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case. 29-09-2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Muhammadi, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitutional Petition and submits that the Petitioner intends to file a fresh petition after obtaining a new disability certificate from the Committee constituted in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
